hero.title: Software Engineer
hero.tagline: EXPERTISE FULL-STACK | DEVOPS & INFRASTRUCTURE | SECURE SOLUTIONS ARCHITECT
hero.description: Full-Stack & DevOps Engineer with end-to-end expertise: from performant Web and Mobile applications to automated infrastructures. Designer of complete solutions like LogSOC. I optimize performance, resilience and security of stacks to accelerate companies' digital transformation.

about.title: Full-Stack Engineer, DevOps & Network Infrastructure
about.description1: Independent consultant specialized in orchestrating complete technological solutions, from architectural design to production deployment. I accompany companies in transforming their information systems, combining innovation, performance and resilience.
about.description2: My expertise covers the entire value chain: modern software architectures, CI/CD pipeline automation, cloud and secure network infrastructures. I design scalable and adaptable solutions, capable of evolving with the company's needs.

projectsList.title: LogSOC: Intelligent Platform for System Log Analysis and Supervision
projectsList.description: Platform dedicated to centralization, automated analysis and anomaly detection on system logs, with AI integration to accelerate diagnosis and strengthen supervision.
features: Unified and scalable architecture for homogeneous data centralization and real-time visualization.
Complete life cycle automation for optimal reliability and accelerated production deployment.
Robust deployment security with a strategic approach to guarantee availability and resilience.

projectsList.title: Automated CI/CD Infrastructure Pipeline
projectsList.description: Complete DevOps infrastructure to industrialize the application life cycle, from source code to production.
features: Complete industrialization of deployment to accelerate delivery cycles.
Reduction of human errors through automation of build, test and validation steps.
Guarantee of code quality through validation gates integrated into pipelines.

projectsList.title: Tactix – Football Strategy Mobile App
projectsList.description: Cross-platform mobile application dedicated to strategy development, performance tracking and football team management.
features: Cross-Platform Development for a smooth user experience on all devices.
Optimized state management for dynamic and reactive rendering of match data and tactical boards.

projectsList.title: Cisco Enterprise Network Infrastructure
projectsList.description: Secure and resilient enterprise network architecture, guaranteeing reliability and connectivity of critical services.
features: Strategic traffic segmentation to strengthen security and optimize performance.
Robust perimeter security and access control to protect IT assets.
High availability to guarantee continuity of essential business services.

projectsList.title: Enterprise Virtualization Infrastructure
projectsList.description: Enterprise-grade virtualization infrastructure to consolidate resources and optimize workloads.
features: Workload optimization for efficient use of hardware resources.
Strengthened service continuity through virtualization and snapshot management.
Centralized administration to simplify management of systems and directory services.

experienceList.title: System & DevOps Engineering Intern
activities: Optimization of system infrastructure and reliability of bank server environments, ensuring high service availability.
Industrialization of web application life cycle: containerization via Docker for scalability, and continuous deployment with GitLab CI/CD to accelerate updates.
Design of the LogSOC system: intelligent monitoring platform and web system supervision, improving service availability and performance through predictive log analysis.

experienceList.title: Network & Telecommunications Intern
activities: Physical installation, cabling and advanced configuration of Enterprise-level network equipment (Huawei and Juniper Routers and Switches).
Implementation of routing and switching protocols, access security (VLANs, ACLs) and troubleshooting on critical telecom links.
Level 2 technical support to ensure high availability of the company's client network infrastructure.

experienceList.title: Computer & Systems Intern
activities: Deployment, configuration of local network equipment (LAN) and optimization of IP addressing plan for different administrative services.
Operational management of computer park: installation of operating systems (Windows/Linux), preventive/curative hardware maintenance and system image deployment.
Technical assistance and on-site level 1 and 2 support for resolving software and network incidents.

experienceList.title: Computer Space Manager
activities: Daily administration of the computer space's local network (access rights management, basic routing and public Wi-Fi security).
Software and hardware maintenance of the park (malware disinfection, critical updates, system performance optimization).
User support, on-site training on digital tools and resolution of connectivity issues.

servicesList.title: Full-Stack Web Development
servicesList.description: Design and development of modern end-to-end web applications. Reactive interfaces with Angular (Signals) and robust and secure backend architectures with Java Spring Boot, Laravel and Flask.

servicesList.title: Cross-Platform Mobile Development
servicesList.description: Creation of performant and intuitive mobile applications for iOS and Android from a single codebase with Flutter & Dart, following best UI/UX and state management practices.

servicesList.title: DevOps & Automation Engineering
servicesList.description: Implementation of cloud/virtualized architectures (VMware ESXi), containerization (Docker), and complete automation of continuous integration and deployment pipelines (GitLab CI/CD, Jenkins, Nginx).

servicesList.title: Networks & Cybersecurity (SecOps)
servicesList.description: Security audit, advanced routing and switching (Cisco IOS), enterprise network configuration (VLANs, NAT, ACLs) and implementation of automated log supervision and analysis systems (LogSOC).

contact.subtitle: Contact
contact.title: Got a project?
contact.description: Let's discuss your web application, secure platform or automation project.

footer.tagline: Building secure and scalable digital solutions for the next generation of businesses.
